title: Egyptian Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and quick stir fry dish from Egypt, featuring tender meat and crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Tender meat
ingredients.notes: You can use beef, chicken or lamb.

ingredients.name: Egyptian spices
ingredients.notes: Use cumin, coriander, and paprika for a traditional flavor.

ingredients.name: Stir-fry oil
ingredients.notes: Vegetable or canola oil works well.

ingredients.name: Sour lemon
ingredients.notes: Juice of half a lemon, for serving.

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they're translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped bell peppers and cook for another 3-4 minutes, until they're tender.
Add the tender meat and cook until it's browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the Egyptian spices and stir-fry oil, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the indulgent tomato sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with a squeeze of sour lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
